open-pdf-get-page-count.title: Open PDF and Get Page Count
open-pdf-get-page-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF file from disk using Aspose.Pdf.Document and retrieve the total number of pages in the document.

open-pdf-from-filestream-and-save.title: Open PDF from FileStream and Save to New File
open-pdf-from-filestream-and-save.description: Shows how to load a PDF using a FileStream and then save it to another file with default Aspose.Pdf settings.

open-protected-pdf-without-password.title: Open Password-Protected PDF Without Password
open-protected-pdf-without-password.description: Demonstrates loading an encrypted PDF with Aspose.Pdf, catching InvalidPasswordException, and handling missing or incorrect password errors.

save-pdf-to-memorystream-and-write-to-fi.title: Save PDF to MemoryStream and Write to File
save-pdf-to-memorystream-and-write-to-fi.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, saving it into a MemoryStream, and then writing the stream contents to a new file.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Metadata Preservation
convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A-1b compliance while preserving metadata, and save the resulting file using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-as-pdfx3-with-color-profiles.title: Export PDF as PDF/X‑3 with Color Profiles
export-pdf-as-pdfx3-with-color-profiles.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/X‑3 compliance while preserving existing color profiles, and save the resulting file using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-with-passwords-restrict-prin.title: Encrypt PDF with Passwords and Restrict Printing
encrypt-pdf-with-passwords-restrict-prin.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying user and owner passwords, setting permissions to disable printing, and saving the encrypted document using Aspose.Pdf.

decrypt-encrypted-pdf.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF with User Password
decrypt-encrypted-pdf.description: Demonstrates opening a password‑protected PDF, decrypting it, and saving an unprotected copy using Aspose.Pdf.

add-blank-page-to-pdf.title: Add Blank Page to PDF
add-blank-page-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, append a new blank page, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-pdf-page-into-another-pdf.title: Insert PDF Page into Another PDF at Specific Position
insert-pdf-page-into-another-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a page from one PDF into another PDF at a given 1‑based position using Aspose.Pdf's Pages.Insert method.

remove-third-page-from-pdf.title: Remove Third Page from PDF
remove-third-page-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete the third page, and save the modified document.

split-multi-page-pdf-into-separate-pages.title: Split Multi-Page PDF into Separate Page Files
split-multi-page-pdf-into-separate-pages.description: Shows how to split a multi-page PDF into individual one-page PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's Document and Pages.Add within a loop.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A‑1b
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, convert each to PDF/A‑1b compliance with Aspose.Pdf, log conversion errors, and save the resulting files.

encrypt-pdf-on-network-stream.title: Encrypt PDF from Network Stream and Return Encrypted Stream
encrypt-pdf-on-network-stream.description: Shows how to read a PDF from a NetworkStream, apply AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, and write the encrypted PDF back to the same stream using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdfx3-document-multiple-pages.title: Create PDF/X‑3 Document with Multiple Pages
create-pdfx3-document-multiple-pages.description: Demonstrates creating a new PDF, adding three pages with simple text, converting it to PDF/X‑3 compliance, and saving the result.

update-pdf-title-metadata.title: Update PDF Title Metadata from Byte Array
update-pdf-title-metadata.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array, changing its title metadata, and saving the modified document to disk using Aspose.Pdf.

load-pdf-disable-font-embedding.title: Load PDF with Font Embedding Disabled and Save
load-pdf-disable-font-embedding.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF using HtmlLoadOptions with IsEmbedFonts set to false to prevent font embedding, then save the document.

save-pdf-incremental-update.title: Save PDF with Incremental Update
save-pdf-incremental-update.description: Demonstrates copying an existing PDF, opening it with a writable stream, appending a new page, and saving using Aspose.Pdf's incremental update mode to preserve the original content.

compress-pdf-default-optimization.title: Compress PDF Using Default Optimization
compress-pdf-default-optimization.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying default resource optimization, saving the compressed file, and comparing the original and compressed file sizes.

export-pdf-pages-to-separate-files.title: Export PDF Pages to Separate Files
export-pdf-pages-to-separate-files.description: Shows how to split a PDF into individual page PDFs by iterating over each page with Aspose.Pdf and saving each page as its own document.

load-pdf-from-memorystream-set-version-1.title: Load PDF from MemoryStream, Set Version to 1.4, and Save to File
load-pdf-from-memorystream-set-version-1.description: Creates a PDF in memory, loads it from a MemoryStream, converts it to PDF version 1.4 using Document.Convert, and saves the resulting file to disk.

encrypt-pdf-allow-form-filling.title: Encrypt PDF Allowing Only Form Filling
encrypt-pdf-allow-form-filling.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, permitting only form filling and disabling content extraction.

create-pdfa1b-with-text-paragraph.title: Create PDF/A-1b Document with Text Paragraph
create-pdfa1b-with-text-paragraph.description: The example creates a new PDF document, adds a text paragraph to the first page, converts the file to PDF/A‑1b compliance, and saves it.

rotate-second-page-pdf.title: Rotate Second Page of PDF
rotate-second-page-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate the second page 90 degrees clockwise, and save the modified document.

update-pdf-author-metadata.title: Update PDF Author Metadata using Aspose.Pdf
update-pdf-author-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf, modify the Author metadata field, and save the changes back to the original file.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-common-password.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with a Common Password
batch-encrypt-pdfs-common-password.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a folder using the same user and owner passwords, set specific permissions, and write the encrypted files to a separate output directory.

batch-decrypt-encrypted-pdfs.title: Batch Decrypt Encrypted PDFs with Owner Password
batch-decrypt-encrypted-pdfs.description: Shows how to open multiple password‑protected PDF files using a shared owner password, remove their encryption, and save unprotected copies.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Font and Structure Preservation
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, convert it to PDF/A‑1b while logging conversion issues and retaining embedded fonts and document structure, and then save the resulting file.

compress-pdf-high-optimization.title: Compress PDF with High Optimization Settings
compress-pdf-high-optimization.description: Demonstrates applying high compression to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's OptimizationOptions and PdfSaveOptions, then reports the original and compressed file sizes.

download-pdf-from-url-and-save.title: Download PDF from URL and Save Locally with Aspose.Pdf
download-pdf-from-url-and-save.description: Demonstrates how to download a PDF file from a network URL using HttpClient, load it into an Aspose.Pdf Document, and save it to the local file system.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-no-printing.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Disable Printing
encrypt-pdf-aes256-no-printing.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256, set no permissions to block printing, and verify the encryption with Aspose.Pdf.

change-pdf-version-to-1-5-incremental-sa.title: Change PDF Version to 1.5 with Incremental Save
change-pdf-version-to-1-5-incremental-sa.description: Shows how to open a PDF, convert its version to PDF 1.5 using Document.Convert, and save the file with an incremental update to avoid rewriting the whole document.

change-pdf-passwords.title: Change PDF Passwords with Aspose.Pdf
change-pdf-passwords.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF, update its user and owner passwords, and save the document with the new credentials using Aspose.Pdf.

split-pdf-at-page-10.title: Split PDF into Two Parts at Page 10
split-pdf-at-page-10.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract pages into two separate documents, and save each part with descriptive filenames.

set-pdf-document-title-and-verify.title: Set PDF Document Title and Verify It
set-pdf-document-title-and-verify.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set the document title, save the file, and read back the title to confirm the change.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b__v2.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑1b with Font Embedding
convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A‑1b compliance (automatically embedding missing fonts) using Aspose.Pdf's Convert method, and save the resulting file.

convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-cmyk.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X‑3 with CMYK Color Space
convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-cmyk.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/X‑3 (which enforces CMYK color conversion), and save the resulting file using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b-csv-report.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with CSV Report
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b-csv-report.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple PDF files to PDF/A‑1b format using Aspose.Pdf, log each conversion, and generate a summary CSV file.

rotate-pdf-page-180-degrees.title: Rotate PDF Page by 180 Degrees
rotate-pdf-page-180-degrees.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a specific page (page 3) of a PDF document by 180 degrees using Aspose.Pdf and save the modified file.

encrypt-pdf-with-user-password.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password Only
encrypt-pdf-with-user-password.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by applying a user password for opening the file while restricting editing and copying permissions.

encrypt-pdf-allow-form-filling__v2.title: Encrypt PDF Allowing Only Form Filling
encrypt-pdf-allow-form-filling__v2.description: The example loads a PDF, restricts permissions to form filling only, encrypts the document with AES‑256, and saves the protected file.

split-pdf-into-single-page-folders.title: Split PDF into Single‑Page Files in Separate Folders
split-pdf-into-single-page-folders.description: Demonstrates how to split a large PDF into individual page PDFs, saving each page in its own folder using Aspose.Pdf.

update-pdf-author-metadata__v2.title: Update PDF Author Metadata
update-pdf-author-metadata__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set the Author field in the document's metadata to the current user, and save the updated file.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-verify-size.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit RC4 and Verify Size Increase
encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-verify-size.description: Demonstrates how to apply 128‑bit RC4 encryption to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then checks that the encrypted file size is slightly larger than the original.

batch-pdf-encryption-from-config.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with User Passwords from Config
batch-pdf-encryption-from-config.description: The example reads a JSON configuration containing multiple PDF encryption tasks, applies user and owner passwords with defined permissions using Aspose.Pdf, and logs the outcomes.

convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-preserve-icc.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X‑3 While Preserving ICC Profiles
convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-preserve-icc.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to PDF/X‑3 using Aspose.Pdf and keep any embedded ICC color profiles for accurate printing.

batch-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-conversion.title: Batch PDF to PDF/A‑1b Conversion with Compression
batch-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-conversion.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple PDF files to PDF/A‑1b format using Aspose.Pdf, applying high compression, optimizing resources, and generating a CSV summary report of the conversion results.

add-custom-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom XMP Metadata to PDF
add-custom-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, creates an XMP metadata packet, attaches it to the document using SetXmpMetadata, and saves the file while preserving the new metadata.

encrypt-pdf-owner-password-only.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password Only (No User Password)
encrypt-pdf-owner-password-only.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by setting only an owner password, leaving the user password empty and disabling all user permissions.

rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate each page by 180 degrees, and save the modified document.

encrypt-pdf-aes128-high-quality-print.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑128 and High‑Quality Printing Permission
encrypt-pdf-aes128-high-quality-print.description: The example loads a PDF, applies AES‑128 encryption with user and owner passwords, enables high‑quality printing permissions, saves the encrypted file, and then verifies the permissions by reopening the document.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v2.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b Compliance
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v2.description: Loads a PDF file, converts it to PDF/A‑1b compliance while logging conversion errors, and saves the resulting PDF/A‑1b document.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-derived-password.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Passwords Derived from File Names
batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-derived-password.description: Shows how to encrypt multiple PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, generating a unique user password from each file name and logging those passwords securely.

batch-split-pdf-by-page-ranges.title: Batch Split PDF into Sections by Page Ranges
batch-split-pdf-by-page-ranges.description: Shows how to split a PDF into multiple files using page ranges read from a configuration file with Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-user-password-form-fill-only.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password and Form‑Fill Only Permission
encrypt-pdf-user-password-form-fill-only.description: Loads an existing PDF, applies AES‑256 encryption with a user and owner password, grants only form‑filling permission (disabling printing), and saves the encrypted document.

set-pdf-metadata-author-title-subject.title: Set PDF Metadata (Author, Title, Subject)
set-pdf-metadata-author-title-subject.description: The example opens an existing PDF, sets its document information fields such as Author, Title, and Subject, saves the file, and then reopens it to confirm the metadata was written correctly.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-verify-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 and Verify Permissions
encrypt-pdf-rc4-verify-permissions.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using the RC4 128‑bit algorithm, disabling copying permissions, and programmatically verifying the security settings by opening and decrypting the file.
